name: literate-agent
description: Literate-programming rules, skills, and hooks for AI agents — dual-audience documents that work for both human readers and AI agents.

metadata.description: Shared LP doctrine. For local development use `claude --plugin-dir /path/to/literate-agent`. Once published to GitHub, register via `claude plugin marketplace add <repo>` and install with `claude plugin install literate-agent@literate-agent --scope user`.

plugins.name: literate-agent
plugins.description: Shared LP doctrine — rules, language hints, tangle hooks, build scripts — auto-imported via @CLAUDE.md and plugin-loaded skills/hooks/commands.
